description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures in a dramatic, emotional pose, with one figure supporting or cradling the other. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed drapery and expressive faces. The upper portions of the figures' heads are highlighted in a lighter, yellowish color, possibly representing crowns or halos. The base is ornate, featuring scrollwork and a central decorative motif. The rear of the sculpture shows the flowing cloak and the back of the figures, with the texture of the material and the folds of the garments clearly visible. The entire piece appears to be made of stone or concrete, with weathering and patina suggesting age and outdoor exposure.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of two human figures in an emotional embrace, with ornate base and classical drapery. The heads are highlighted in a lighter color, and the piece shows signs of age and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures' faces, the embrace, and the ornate base details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures, the drapery, and the layered cloak.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures, the flowing cloak, and the full texture of the sculpture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the embrace and the detailed base.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in an emotional embrace
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
